summary.en: Normal tests and certifies the hardware of the future.
summary.zh: Normal 為未來的硬體進行測試與認證。

highlight.en: Normal positions itself as a testing and certification provider for next-generation hardware, vouching for the reliability of emerging physical products.
highlight.zh: Normal 將自己定位為次世代硬體的測試與認證供應商,為新興實體產品的可靠性背書。

summary.en: Comena builds AI agents that automate order entry for distributors and manufacturers.
summary.zh: Comena 打造 AI 代理,為經銷商與製造商自動化訂單登錄。

highlight.en: Comena streamlines order and quote entry from inbox to ERP, freeing inside sales and customer service teams from hours of manual data entry to focus on proactive selling.
highlight.zh: Comena 將訂單與報價登錄從收件匣一路打通到 ERP,讓內勤銷售與客服團隊擺脫數小時的手動輸入,專注於主動銷售。

summary.en: Physical Turing runs real-world evaluations of humanoid robots.
summary.zh: Physical Turing 為人形機器人進行真實世界的評測。

highlight.en: Physical Turing procures and staffs diverse target environments to evaluate humanoid robots in the real world, surfacing valuable failure data before production.
highlight.zh: Physical Turing 採購並配置多樣化的目標場景,在真實世界中評測人形機器人,於量產前找出有價值的失效數據。

summary.en: Iron Grid builds foundational models for risk and quality.
summary.zh: Iron Grid 打造用於風險與品質的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Iron Grid focuses on foundational AI models targeted specifically at assessing risk and quality, rather than general-purpose use.
highlight.zh: Iron Grid 專注於針對風險與品質評估的基礎 AI 模型,而非通用用途。

summary.en: Quotain runs AI sales simulations built from your real deals.
summary.zh: Quotain 以你真實的成交資料來執行 AI 銷售模擬。

highlight.en: Reps feed Quotain CRM notes, past calls, LinkedIn profiles, and websites to create realistic AI buyers to practice with, then get scored with specific feedback after each call.
highlight.zh: 業務員提供 CRM 記錄、過往通話、LinkedIn 檔案與網站,讓 Quotain 生成擬真的 AI 買家供其演練,每次通話後再獲得評分與具體改進建議。

summary.en: SigmanticAI is an AI-native chip design assistant that turns natural language into silicon-ready designs.
summary.zh: SigmanticAI 是 AI 原生的晶片設計助手,將自然語言轉化為可流片的晶片設計。

highlight.en: Branded the Cursor for HDL, SigmanticAI uses fine-tuned Verilog LLMs and real compiler feedback inside a VSCode fork to iteratively refine RTL until it compiles and passes synthesis.
highlight.zh: 被稱為 HDL 設計界的 Cursor,SigmanticAI 在 VSCode 分支內運用微調的 Verilog LLM 與真實編譯器回饋,反覆優化 RTL 直到通過編譯與合成。

summary.en: Okibi lets you build AI coworkers using natural language, like Lovable for agents.
summary.zh: Okibi 讓你用自然語言打造 AI 同事,就像代理版的 Lovable。

highlight.en: Rather than janky drag-and-drop builders, Okibi is a web app that lets anyone describe in natural language the exact AI agent they want to connect to their internal software.
highlight.zh: 有別於難用的拖放式建構器,Okibi 是一款網頁應用,讓任何人用自然語言描述想要的 AI 代理,並連接到內部軟體。

summary.en: Flywheel AI converts existing excavators for remote operation, like Waymo for excavators.
summary.zh: Flywheel AI 改裝現有挖土機以實現遠端操作,被喻為挖土機版的 Waymo。

highlight.en: Flywheel AI retrofits contractors' existing excavators for remote operation to boost safety and productivity, while collecting a robotics dataset to train autonomous driving policies.
highlight.zh: Flywheel AI 改裝承包商現有的挖土機以遠端操作,提升安全與生產力,同時收集機器人數據集來訓練自主操作策略。

summary.en: stagewise is an open-source agentic IDE for creating and orchestrating coding agents.
summary.zh: stagewise 是開源的代理式 IDE,用於建立與協調編碼代理。

highlight.en: stagewise lets developers run coding agents in parallel with their own models or subscriptions, keeping agents connected to browser and runtime context, Git workflows, tests, docs, and deployment paths.
highlight.zh: stagewise 讓開發者用自己的模型或訂閱平行運行多個編碼代理,並讓代理連接瀏覽器與執行環境上下文、Git 流程、測試、文件與部署路徑。

summary.en: Clodo offers planet-scale people discovery for GTM, recruiting, and operations.
summary.zh: Clodo 提供全球規模的人物探索,服務於市場進入、招募與營運。

highlight.en: Clodo is used across GTM, recruiting, marketing, and ops by AI natives, B2Bs, and Fortune 500s spanning SaaS, manufacturing, biotech, healthcare, fintech, and compliance.
highlight.zh: Clodo 被 AI 原生公司、B2B 與財星 500 大企業用於市場進入、招募、行銷與營運,涵蓋 SaaS、製造、生技、醫療、金融科技與合規等領域。

summary.en: TectoAI is a governance platform for managing a company's AI stack.
summary.zh: TectoAI 是用於管理公司 AI 技術堆疊的治理平台。

highlight.en: Tecto helps companies identify roles fillable by agentic AI, onboard them quickly, then monitor their performance and behavior to keep them compliant and aligned with regulations.
highlight.zh: Tecto 協助企業辨識可由代理式 AI 擔任的職務、快速導入,並在部署後監控其表現與行為,確保合規並符合法規。

summary.en: RowFlow replaces web forms with AI conversations over text, Slack, or chat.
summary.zh: RowFlow 用 AI 對話取代網頁表單,透過簡訊、Slack 或聊天進行。

highlight.en: RowFlow converts any existing form into an AI-powered conversation that follows up automatically and returns clean structured data, raising response rates while cutting internal overhead.
highlight.zh: RowFlow 將任何現有表單轉成 AI 驅動的對話,自動跟進並回傳乾淨的結構化資料,在提升回覆率的同時減少內部負擔。

summary.en: Outrove is an ultra-realistic AI recruiter with a video and audio interview agent.
summary.zh: Outrove 是超擬真的 AI 招募人員,配備影音兼具的面試代理。

highlight.en: Outrove's human-appearing interview agent has both video and audio and can join Google Meet calls to conduct realistic recruiting interviews.
highlight.zh: Outrove 的面試代理外觀近似真人,具備影像與語音,並能加入 Google Meet 通話進行擬真的招募面試。

summary.en: Preseen builds AI forecasting agents for global macro events.
summary.zh: Preseen 為全球總體經濟事件打造 AI 預測代理。

highlight.en: Preseen focuses on forecasting agents aimed specifically at global macroeconomic events, applying AI to a notoriously hard-to-predict domain.
highlight.zh: Preseen 專注於針對全球總體經濟事件的預測代理,將 AI 應用於出了名難以預測的領域。

summary.en: TraceRoot.AI is an open-source self-healing layer for AI agents.
summary.zh: TraceRoot.AI 是 AI 代理的開源自我修復層。

highlight.en: TraceRoot captures traces and debugs with AI that has visibility into your source code and GitHub history, providing observability plus automated self-healing for agents.
highlight.zh: TraceRoot 擷取追蹤資訊,並透過能讀取你原始碼與 GitHub 歷史的 AI 進行除錯,為代理提供可觀測性與自動自我修復。

summary.en: Panels is an audio data platform supplying speech datasets to AI labs.
summary.zh: Panels 是音訊資料平台,為 AI 實驗室提供語音資料集。

highlight.en: Panels delivers high-quality speech datasets from vetted, diverse contributors to train and evaluate foundational voice models.
highlight.zh: Panels 提供來自經審核且多元貢獻者的高品質語音資料集,用於訓練與評估基礎語音模型。

summary.en: Riverbank is an AI-native red team for offensive security.
summary.zh: Riverbank 是 AI 原生的紅隊,專注於攻擊性資安。

highlight.en: Built by an ex-NSA and DoD team, Riverbank blends AI agent swarms with experienced human operators to break through cyber defenses, targeting the pentesting market.
highlight.zh: 由前 NSA 與國防部團隊打造,Riverbank 結合 AI 代理群與資深人類操作員突破網路防禦,瞄準滲透測試市場。

summary.en: Epicenter stores ChatGPT-style memory in an open, portable, local-first format.
summary.zh: Epicenter 以開放、可攜、本機優先的格式儲存類似 ChatGPT 的記憶。

highlight.en: Epicenter is an ecosystem of open-source, local-first apps that share one memory stored as plain text and SQLite, so you own your notes, transcripts, and chats and choose your own AI models.
highlight.zh: Epicenter 是一套開源、本機優先的應用生態系,共享以純文字與 SQLite 儲存的單一記憶,讓你擁有自己的筆記、逐字稿與對話,並自選 AI 模型。

summary.en: Mimos is a growth and intake operating system for plaintiff-side law firms.
summary.zh: Mimos 是專為原告方律所打造的成長與案件受理作業系統。

highlight.en: Mimos automates the path from ad click to signed retainer, managing high-intent acquisition channels, intake CRM, and spend-to-case data so firms know what to scale or fix.
highlight.zh: Mimos 自動化從廣告點擊到簽署委任的流程,管理高意向獲客管道、受理 CRM 與花費對案件的數據,讓律所知道該擴大或修正什麼。

summary.en: Adaptional builds agentic AI to review insurance claims.
summary.zh: Adaptional 打造代理式 AI 來審查保險理賠。

highlight.en: With claims making up 75% of every dollar in insurance, Adaptional deploys AI claims-review agents already in use at major P&C carriers, escalating actions to human adjusters.
highlight.zh: 理賠佔保險業每一塊錢的 75%,Adaptional 部署的 AI 理賠審查代理已在大型產險業者使用,並將需處理事項上呈給人類理賠員。

summary.en: Proliferate lets you manage a team of agents from your desktop.
summary.zh: Proliferate 讓你從桌面端管理一整支代理團隊。

highlight.en: Proliferate is a fully open-source, free tool for managing a fleet of agents running locally or in the cloud.
highlight.zh: Proliferate 是一款完全開源、免費的工具,用於管理在本機或雲端運行的代理群。

summary.en: Relling aims to deploy the first billion robots for manufacturing.
summary.zh: Relling 目標是為製造業部署首批十億台機器人。

highlight.en: Relling's stated ambition is to bring a billion robots into manufacturing, signaling a focus on mass-scale industrial robotics.
highlight.zh: Relling 宣示的目標是將十億台機器人帶入製造業,顯示其專注於大規模工業機器人。

summary.en: Motives runs consumer focus groups with a team of AI agents.
summary.zh: Motives 以一支 AI 代理團隊執行消費者焦點團體訪談。

highlight.en: Motives' AI agents moderate and analyze video interviews to help consumer brands understand preferences and test ideas in hours instead of weeks.
highlight.zh: Motives 的 AI 代理主持並分析影像訪談,協助消費品牌在數小時而非數週內理解消費者偏好並測試新點子。

summary.en: Alara is a procurement platform for dental offices.
summary.zh: Alara 是牙科診所的採購平台。

highlight.en: Alara aggregates listings from many suppliers with real-time price comparisons and a single cart, helping dental offices save time and money on supply orders.
highlight.zh: Alara 彙整多家供應商的商品,提供即時比價與單一購物車,協助牙科診所在採購耗材時省時又省錢。

summary.en: Pleom delivers agentic business intelligence with automatic insights on company data.
summary.zh: Pleom 提供代理式商業智慧,自動從公司資料產生洞察。

highlight.en: Pleom automatically generates insights and visualizations from all your company data with a zero learning curve, speeding up business workflows.
highlight.zh: Pleom 自動從你所有的公司資料產生洞察與視覺化圖表,零學習曲線,加速商業流程。

summary.en: Juxta is building a hardware-free GPS alternative for positioning anywhere on earth.
summary.zh: Juxta 打造無需硬體的 GPS 替代方案,可在地球任何地方定位。

highlight.en: Juxta's Universal Positioning System uses custom ML models and synthetic fingerprinting to make any indoor, outdoor, or underground space location-aware in minutes with no new hardware.
highlight.zh: Juxta 的通用定位系統運用自有 ML 模型與合成指紋技術,無需新硬體即可在數分鐘內讓任何室內、室外或地下空間具備定位能力。

summary.en: Bizzy is an AI that works 24/7 to handle calls and capture leads.
summary.zh: Bizzy 是全天候運作的 AI,負責接聽來電並擷取潛在客戶。

highlight.en: Bizzy answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments straight into your CRM, routing and escalating calls and syncing with existing tools to run complex workflows.
highlight.zh: Bizzy 接聽來電、篩選潛在客戶並直接將預約寫入你的 CRM,還能轉接與上呈來電,並與現有工具同步以執行複雜流程。

summary.en: Icarus builds autonomous stratospheric solar aircraft for defense.
summary.zh: Icarus 為國防打造自主的平流層太陽能飛行器。

highlight.en: Pitched as the modern U-2 spy plane, Icarus's solar aircraft fly at 60,000 feet for weeks, delivering persistent military intelligence and connectivity above weather and below satellites.
highlight.zh: 被定位為現代版 U-2 偵察機,Icarus 的太陽能飛行器在 6 萬英尺高空持續飛行數週,於天候之上、衛星之下提供持久的軍事情報與通訊。

summary.en: Bolna AI is a Voice AI orchestration platform built for Indian enterprises.
summary.zh: Bolna AI 是專為印度企業打造的語音 AI 協調平台。

highlight.en: Bolna lets enterprises build voice agents from their transcripts and FAQs, with smart routing across providers for cost efficiency and strong multi-language, multi-accent performance.
highlight.zh: Bolna 讓企業以逐字稿與常見問答建構語音代理,透過跨供應商的智慧路由提升成本效率,並具備優異的多語言、多口音辨識能力。

summary.en: Uplane replaces marketing agencies with AI that generates ads and steers spend.
summary.zh: Uplane 用 AI 取代行銷代理商,自動生成廣告並調配預算。

highlight.en: Uplane generates hundreds of ads with matching landing pages, steers spend across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn, and connects to CRM and ERP data to learn what drives profit.
highlight.zh: Uplane 生成數百則廣告與相應的到達頁,在 Meta、Google 與 LinkedIn 間調配花費,並串接 CRM 與 ERP 資料以學習什麼能帶來利潤。

summary.en: Piggy Robotics builds humanoid robots that do chores at iPhone prices.
summary.zh: Piggy Robotics 打造能做家務的人形機器人,售價如同一支 iPhone。

highlight.en: Piggy replaces costly motors with artificial muscles, tubes wrapped in braided fibre powered by a single pump, making humanoids cheap enough to mass-produce by the millions.
highlight.zh: Piggy 以人工肌肉取代昂貴馬達,即包覆編織纖維的管子,由單一泵浦驅動,使人形機器人便宜到能以百萬台規模量產。

summary.en: Sunflower is a sobriety platform combining a consumer app with a tele-therapy clinic.
summary.zh: Sunflower 是戒癮平台,結合消費者應用與遠距治療診所。

highlight.en: Described as a Duolingo for addiction, Sunflower pairs an AI sponsor, progress tracking, and social features with a tele-therapy clinic, growing from 0 to 100k monthly users in under six months.
highlight.zh: 被喻為戒癮版 Duolingo,Sunflower 結合 AI 戒癮夥伴、進度追蹤與社群功能,並附設遠距治療診所,在不到半年內月活躍用戶從 0 成長到 10 萬。

summary.en: Brickanta builds agentic AI for the construction industry.
summary.zh: Brickanta 為營建產業打造代理式 AI。

highlight.en: Brickanta offers hundreds of construction-specific AI agents for project analysis, tenders, and procurement, and has raised $8 million from investors behind OpenAI, Airbnb, and Klarna.
highlight.zh: Brickanta 提供數百個營建專用 AI 代理,涵蓋專案分析、招標與採購,並已從 OpenAI、Airbnb 與 Klarna 背後的投資人募得 800 萬美元。

summary.en: Structured AI builds an AI workforce for construction design engineering.
summary.zh: Structured AI 為營建設計工程打造 AI 勞動力。

highlight.en: Structured AI's agents learn a firm's standards and building codes to automatically QA mechanical, electrical, and structural drawings, reducing clashes and costly RFIs and change orders.
highlight.zh: Structured AI 的代理學習公司標準與建築法規,自動對機械、電氣與結構圖進行品管,減少衝突以及成本高昂的 RFI 與變更單。

summary.en: MOVEdot builds AI agents for hardware engineering tasks.
summary.zh: MOVEdot 為硬體工程任務打造 AI 代理。

highlight.en: MOVEdot's agents run hardware tasks that normally take hours or days in minutes, analyzing failures across test campaigns, pulling KPIs from databases, and documenting findings in reports.
highlight.zh: MOVEdot 的代理在數分鐘內完成原本需數小時或數天的硬體任務,跨測試專案分析失效、從資料庫擷取 KPI,並將結果整理成報告。

summary.en: ComplyDo is a flexible compliance engine for global enterprises.
summary.zh: ComplyDo 是為全球企業打造的彈性合規引擎。

highlight.en: ComplyDo extracts requirements from any file, maps them to controls and policies, surfaces gaps, monitors changes, and advises on next steps to make GRC teams far more efficient.
highlight.zh: ComplyDo 從任何檔案擷取合規要求,對應到控制措施與政策,找出落差、監控變更並建議後續步驟,大幅提升 GRC 團隊的效率。

summary.en: Autonomous is a superintelligent financial advisor charging 0% advisory fees.
summary.zh: Autonomous 是收取 0% 顧問費的超智慧理財顧問。

highlight.en: Autonomous aims to deliver wealth strategies typically reserved for the ultra-wealthy, like tax-loss harvesting and portfolio-backed borrowing, at no advisory fee instead of the usual 1-2%.
highlight.zh: Autonomous 力圖以零顧問費(而非常見的 1-2%)提供原本專屬超級富豪的財富策略,如稅損收割與以投資組合質押借款。

summary.en: Zavo is an AI-powered operating system for restaurants.
summary.zh: Zavo 是為餐廳打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Zavo unifies payments, point of sale, and AI agents into one in-house platform spanning reservations to checkout, automating repetitive tasks to replace fragmented restaurant tools.
highlight.zh: Zavo 將支付、POS 與 AI 代理整合進一套自建平台,從訂位到結帳一氣呵成,並自動化重複性工作以取代零散的餐廳工具。

summary.en: Hyperspell is a company brain that gives AI agents live, permissioned context.
summary.zh: Hyperspell 是企業大腦,為 AI 代理提供即時且具權限控管的上下文。

highlight.en: Hyperspell connects your tools and synthesizes documents and conversations into a live, permissioned context graph that any agent can read from and write back to, with every fact traced to source.
highlight.zh: Hyperspell 串接你的工具,將文件與對話彙整成即時且具權限控管的上下文圖譜,任何代理皆可讀寫,且每項事實都可追溯來源。

summary.en: Leadbay qualifies millions of data-signal-scarce leads that were previously unfindable.
summary.zh: Leadbay 篩選出數百萬筆過去無法找到、資料訊號稀缺的潛在客戶。

highlight.en: Teams at L'Oréal, Saint-Gobain, and Nespresso B2B use Leadbay to 3x their addressable market, with one customer saying 10 minutes on Leadbay beats six months with Clay and a GTM agency.
highlight.zh: L'Oréal、Saint-Gobain 與 Nespresso B2B 等團隊使用 Leadbay 將可觸及市場擴大三倍,有客戶表示用 Leadbay 十分鐘勝過用 Clay 加市場進入代理商六個月。

summary.en: Amera automates claims processing for health insurance payers.
summary.zh: Amera 為健康保險給付方自動化理賠處理流程。

highlight.en: Amera turns messy claim inputs like PDFs, bills, and EDI into structured data that plugs into existing systems, already serving payers and plan administrators representing about 100k members.
highlight.zh: Amera 將 PDF、帳單與 EDI 等雜亂的理賠輸入轉成可接入現有系統的結構化資料,目前服務代表約 10 萬名會員的給付方與計畫管理者。

summary.en: Clicks is an AI-native BPO that automates back-office operations with agents.
summary.zh: Clicks 是 AI 原生的 BPO,以代理自動化後台營運。

highlight.en: Clicks replaces traditional BPOs with AI agents that operate your existing tools and processes, claiming higher accuracy and faster turnaround at lower cost, with SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA compliance.
highlight.zh: Clicks 以能操作你現有工具與流程的 AI 代理取代傳統 BPO,標榜更高準確度、更快交付且成本更低,並內建 SOC 2 Type 2 與 HIPAA 合規。

summary.en: Prox provides AI technical support for complex physical products.
summary.zh: Prox 為複雜實體產品提供 AI 技術支援。

highlight.en: Prox targets support for hard products like industrial heaters, HVAC, and EV chargers, where help requires trained domain specialists, such as certified electricians, who are in short supply.
highlight.zh: Prox 鎖定工業加熱器、HVAC 與電動車充電樁等難解產品的支援,這類產品需要受過訓練的領域專家(如合格電工)才能服務,而這類人才極為稀缺。

summary.en: Parametric builds autonomous physical businesses that run themselves.
summary.zh: Parametric 打造能自我運作的自主實體事業。

highlight.en: Starting with a laundromat designed for autonomy, Parametric redesigns processes around robots as first-class citizens rather than retrofitting human workflows.
highlight.zh: Parametric 從一間為自主運作而設計的自助洗衣店起步,以機器人為核心重新設計流程,而非把人類流程硬塞給機器人。

summary.en: Wardstone builds satellites for missile defense.
summary.zh: Wardstone 打造用於飛彈防禦的衛星。

highlight.en: Wardstone designs and deploys satellites equipped with space-based interceptors to kinetically counter hypersonic and ballistic missiles for the US and its allies.
highlight.zh: Wardstone 設計並部署搭載太空攔截器的衛星,以動能攔截高超音速與彈道飛彈,保護美國及其盟友。

summary.en: Tornyol builds micro-drones that kill mosquitoes.
summary.zh: Tornyol 打造能撲殺蚊子的微型無人機。

highlight.en: Tornyol turns 40-gram toy drones into mosquito killers using smartphone mics, car park sensors, and clever DSP, aiming to cut mosquito control costs 100x and eradicate mosquitoes from cities.
highlight.zh: Tornyol 運用智慧型手機麥克風、停車輔助感測器與巧妙的數位訊號處理,把 40 克玩具無人機改造成滅蚊機,目標將滅蚊成本降低 100 倍並從城市中根除蚊子。

summary.en: Trelium is an agent that builds your agents.
summary.zh: Trelium 是用來打造你的代理的代理。

highlight.en: Trelium positions itself as a meta-agent whose purpose is to construct other AI agents, abstracting away the work of building agents from scratch.
highlight.zh: Trelium 將自己定位為元代理,專門用於建構其他 AI 代理,把從零打造代理的工作抽象化。

summary.en: AtlasGrid maps mobile app UI into a visual graph with on-screen analytics to speed iteration.
summary.zh: AtlasGrid 將行動應用的 UI 繪製成視覺化圖譜,並在畫面上呈現分析數據以加速迭代。

highlight.en: AtlasGrid auto-builds a visual graph of an app's UI with analytics on each screen, while AI agents continuously analyze thousands of apps for design insights and growth opportunities.
highlight.zh: AtlasGrid 自動建構應用 UI 的視覺化圖譜,並在每個畫面顯示分析數據,同時由 AI 代理持續分析數千款應用,挖掘設計洞察與成長機會。

summary.en: SellRaze is an AI selling assistant that lists items across marketplaces in seconds.
summary.zh: SellRaze 是 AI 銷售助手,能在數秒內將商品上架到多個市集。

highlight.en: Point your camera at any item and SellRaze identifies, prices, and lists it across marketplaces; more than 2,500 items worth over $326,000 are added daily.
highlight.zh: 用相機對準任何物品,SellRaze 便能辨識、定價並上架到多個市集;每天有超過 2,500 件、總值逾 32.6 萬美元的商品被加入。

summary.en: AnswerThis is an end-to-end workspace that accelerates scientific discovery.
summary.zh: AnswerThis 是端到端工作空間,加速科學發現。

highlight.en: Used by over 200,000 researchers, AnswerThis cuts weeks of literature work to hours by finding relevant papers, mapping how ideas connect, and giving line-by-line answers to complex questions.
highlight.zh: AnswerThis 已有超過 20 萬名研究者使用,透過尋找相關論文、釐清概念間的連結並對複雜問題逐行作答,將數週的文獻工作縮短為數小時。

summary.en: SF Tensor builds infrastructure so AI labs can focus on research.
summary.zh: SF Tensor 打造基礎設施,讓 AI 實驗室專注於研究。

highlight.en: SF Tensor's Elastic Cloud finds the cheapest GPUs across providers and handles spot preemption to cut compute costs by up to 80%, plus automatic kernel optimization that speeds up training code.
highlight.zh: SF Tensor 的 Elastic Cloud 跨供應商尋找最便宜的 GPU 並處理競價執行個體的中斷,將運算成本最多降低 80%,並透過自動核心優化加速訓練程式碼。

summary.en: Multifactor provides zero-trust authentication, authorization, and auditing for AI agents.
summary.zh: Multifactor 為 AI 代理提供零信任的身分驗證、授權與稽核。

highlight.en: Multifactor lets users securely and revocably share online accounts with agents while keeping fine-grained permissions and audit history, aiming to define agent security like Okta did for identity.
highlight.zh: Multifactor 讓使用者能安全且可撤銷地將線上帳號分享給代理,同時保有細緻權限與稽核歷程,目標是像 Okta 之於身分般定義代理安全這個品類。

summary.en: Absurd is a creative OS for making AI brand and performance video ads at scale.
summary.zh: Absurd 是創意作業系統,用於大規模製作 AI 品牌與成效型影音廣告。

highlight.en: Companies like Hims, Kalshi, Replit, and Brex use Absurd to create production-quality videos in 72 hours; its Kalshi Election Day video hit 1M+ views with videos averaging 400K+ organic views.
highlight.zh: Hims、Kalshi、Replit 與 Brex 等公司用 Absurd 在 72 小時內製作出量產品質的影片;其為 Kalshi 製作的 Election Day 影片觀看數破百萬,影片平均自然觀看數逾 40 萬。

summary.en: item is an AI-native CRM that becomes a company's source of truth for teams and agents.
summary.zh: item 是 AI 原生的 CRM,成為團隊與代理共享的單一真實來源。

highlight.en: item connects all customer tools and auto-enriches context, with an Assistant for daily prompts and Agents you train by writing process docs to run sales, support, and account management autonomously.
highlight.zh: item 串接所有客戶工具並自動豐富上下文,搭配可用提示處理日常工作的 Assistant,以及透過撰寫流程文件來訓練、可自主執行銷售、客服與客戶管理的 Agents。

summary.en: Lapis is AI that creates and runs ads end-to-end, starting with ChatGPT Ads.
summary.zh: Lapis 是端到端建立與投放廣告的 AI,從 ChatGPT Ads 起步。

highlight.en: Lapis lets businesses iterate ad copy and A/B test at scale on ChatGPT, Google, and Meta; it serves 1,000+ marketing teams from Hyundai and Tata to SMBs across 15+ languages.
highlight.zh: Lapis 讓企業在 ChatGPT、Google 與 Meta 上大規模迭代廣告文案並進行 A/B 測試,已服務逾 1,000 個行銷團隊,從 Hyundai、Tata 到中小企業,支援 15 種以上語言。

summary.en: AirCaps is an AI copilot for in-person conversations via lightweight AR glasses.
summary.zh: AirCaps 是面對面對話的 AI 副駕駛,透過輕量 AR 眼鏡呈現。

highlight.en: AirCaps overlays live captions, translations, and AI notes onto your field of vision for face-to-face talks; it did $93K revenue in October, growing 6.5x from September on under $3K of marketing.
highlight.zh: AirCaps 將即時字幕、翻譯與 AI 筆記疊加在你的視野中,輔助面對面交談;十月營收 9.3 萬美元,在行銷花費不到 3,000 美元下較九月成長 6.5 倍。

summary.en: Sorce is Tinder for jobs: swipe right and AI applies on your behalf.
summary.zh: Sorce 是求職版 Tinder:向右滑,AI 就替你投遞申請。

highlight.en: Sorce turns job hunting into a swipe-based experience where swiping right triggers AI to submit applications on the candidate's behalf.
highlight.zh: Sorce 把找工作變成滑卡式體驗,向右滑即觸發 AI 代為提交求職申請。

summary.en: Koyal is an agentic AI filmmaking platform that turns scripts or audio into stories.
summary.zh: Koyal 是代理式 AI 製片平台,將劇本或音訊轉化為故事。

highlight.en: Built by a CMU, MIT, and Meta team on NeurIPS-published research, Koyal runs paid pilots with major music labels and production houses, including Universal Music and T-Series.
highlight.zh: 由 CMU、MIT 與 Meta 團隊基於 NeurIPS 發表的研究打造,Koyal 與包括 Universal Music 與 T-Series 在內的大型唱片公司與製作公司進行付費試行。

summary.en: Casey is an AI-native commercial insurance brokerage.
summary.zh: Casey 是 AI 原生的商業保險經紀公司。

highlight.en: At Casey, human brokers focus on client relationships and closing deals while AI handles all the operational work behind the scenes.
highlight.zh: 在 Casey,人類經紀人專注於客戶關係與成交,AI 則在幕後處理所有營運工作。

summary.en: s2.dev is an API for unlimited, durable, real-time streams.
summary.zh: s2.dev 是提供無限、持久、即時串流的 API。

highlight.en: Described as if Kafka and S3 had a baby, S2 reimagines streams as an unlimited, access-controlled web resource for persisting agent context, broadcasting feeds, and multiplayer experiences.
highlight.zh: 被形容為 Kafka 與 S3 的結晶,S2 將串流重新想像為無限且具存取控管的網路資源,可用於保存代理上下文、廣播即時資料與多人協作體驗。

summary.en: Imagine AI reverse engineers B2B growth, starting with LinkedIn.
summary.zh: Imagine AI 逆向工程 B2B 成長,從 LinkedIn 起步。

highlight.en: Imagine AI builds coordinated content systems where a CEO, VP of Sales, and Head of Marketing post aligned narratives; 50+ companies including MongoDB and Rippling drove $31M in attributed revenue.
highlight.zh: Imagine AI 打造協調式內容系統,讓 CEO、銷售副總與行銷主管發布一致的敘事;包括 MongoDB 與 Rippling 在內的 50 多家公司藉此帶來 3,100 萬美元的歸因營收。

summary.en: Expected Parrot lets companies simulate their customers with AI agents.
summary.zh: Expected Parrot 讓企業以 AI 代理模擬其顧客。

highlight.en: With an open-source library and no-code app, Expected Parrot designs agent personas to run surveys and interviews using your chosen LLMs; results are cached, reproducible, and validatable against humans.
highlight.zh: Expected Parrot 提供開源函式庫與無程式碼應用,設計代理人設以你選定的 LLM 執行問卷與訪談;結果可快取、可重現,並能與真人受訪者比對驗證。

summary.en: Lua is an agent platform for mid-market companies.
summary.zh: Lua 是面向中型企業的代理平台。

highlight.en: Lua is an agentOS that delivers enterprise-grade reliability at mid-market speed and economics, scaling through developer agencies and channel partners rather than a heavy enterprise sales motion.
highlight.zh: Lua 是一套 agentOS,以中型市場的速度與成本提供企業級可靠度,透過開發者代理商與通路夥伴擴張,而非依賴龐大的企業銷售團隊。

summary.en: Crunched is an Excel AI analyst for power users in consulting, banking, and PE.
summary.zh: Crunched 是面向顧問、投行與私募股權重度用戶的 Excel AI 分析師。

highlight.en: Crunched error-checks workbooks end-to-end, builds models from scratch, and links data from IMs to templates, all inside Excel; it is already live with firms across six European countries.
highlight.zh: Crunched 在 Excel 內端到端檢查工作簿錯誤、從零建模,並將投資備忘錄的資料連結到範本模型,目前已在六個歐洲國家的公司上線使用。

summary.en: Karumi is an AI agent that joins live video calls to deliver personalized product demos.
summary.zh: Karumi 是會加入即時視訊通話、提供個人化產品示範的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Karumi delivers personalized demos on live calls 24/7 in any language, bridging landing page to sales by engaging visitors at peak interest, plus self-guided interactive demos for the not-yet-ready.
highlight.zh: Karumi 全天候以任何語言在即時通話中提供個人化示範,在訪客興趣最高時介入,銜接到達頁與業務團隊,並為尚未準備好的訪客提供自助式互動示範。

summary.en: Moss is a real-time semantic search runtime for conversational and multimodal AI.
summary.zh: Moss 是為對話式與多模態 AI 打造的即時語意搜尋執行環境。

highlight.en: Moss eliminates retrieval lag by keeping search close to where the agent runs, retrieving in sub-10ms via a Rust and WebAssembly vector index that runs natively in browsers, mobile, and servers.
highlight.zh: Moss 將搜尋緊貼代理運行之處以消除檢索延遲,透過以 Rust 與 WebAssembly 打造、可在瀏覽器、行動裝置與伺服器原生運行的向量索引,在 10 毫秒內完成檢索。

summary.en: Deeptrace builds AI agents for on-call that investigate and resolve production alerts.
summary.zh: Deeptrace 打造用於待命值班的 AI 代理,調查並解決生產環境告警。

highlight.en: Deeptrace's agents investigate and resolve production alerts end-to-end, cutting through noise to pinpoint root causes so engineers can build instead of firefighting.
highlight.zh: Deeptrace 的代理端到端調查並解決生產環境告警,從雜訊中快速定位根本原因,讓工程師能專注開發而非救火。

summary.en: Caddy is a proactive AI work partner that lives in iMessage.
summary.zh: Caddy 是常駐於 iMessage 的主動式 AI 工作夥伴。

highlight.en: Built by the team behind Loom's AI, Caddy learns how you work and creates real artifacts in your voice across email, calendar, Slack, Linear, and Notion, quietly getting work done in the background.
highlight.zh: 由 Loom AI 背後的團隊打造,Caddy 學習你的工作方式,以你的語氣在 email、行事曆、Slack、Linear 與 Notion 中產出真實成果,在背景默默完成工作。

summary.en: hillclimb produces training data for recursive self-improvement of AI.
summary.zh: hillclimb 為 AI 的遞迴自我改進製作訓練資料。

highlight.en: hillclimb works with frontier AI labs to help train their agents to become AI research scientists.
highlight.zh: hillclimb 與前沿 AI 實驗室合作,協助訓練其代理成為 AI 研究科學家。

summary.en: Mod AI is a fully autonomous, touchless accounts payable platform.
summary.zh: Mod AI 是全自主、零接觸的應付帳款自動化平台。

highlight.en: Mod AI's clerks handle the entire AP workflow, from invoice processing and GL coding to PO matching, approvals, and fraud detection, integrating with 16+ ERPs including NetSuite, SAP, and Workday.
highlight.zh: Mod AI 的 AI 文書員處理整個應付帳款流程,從發票處理、總帳編碼到採購單比對、審批與詐欺偵測,並串接包括 NetSuite、SAP 與 Workday 在內的 16 種以上 ERP。

summary.en: Codyco is an AI reservation team that turns hotel groups' missed calls into bookings.
summary.zh: Codyco 是 AI 訂房團隊,將飯店集團的未接來電轉化為訂房。

highlight.en: Hotel groups forward missed calls to Codyco, whose AI answers, takes the booking, and writes it straight into the PMS, plugging a five-figure-per-property revenue leak from lost calls.
highlight.zh: 飯店集團將未接來電轉給 Codyco,其 AI 接聽、完成訂房並直接寫入 PMS,堵住因漏接電話而每間飯店損失五位數的營收缺口。

summary.en: Lexi builds AI associates for corporate law.
summary.zh: Lexi 為公司法打造 AI 律師助理。

highlight.en: Lexi's AI associates learn a firm's standards and improve with every case, having already handled 135,000+ documents across 7,000+ cases.
highlight.zh: Lexi 的 AI 律師助理學習律所的標準並隨每個案件持續進步,目前已處理逾 13.5 萬份文件、橫跨 7,000 多個案件。

summary.en: Play Health is a perimenopause care platform for women and their providers.
summary.zh: Play Health 是為女性與其醫療提供者打造的更年期前期照護平台。

highlight.en: Serving over 30 million US women who spend $15B+ annually on symptoms, Play Health integrates symptom, medication, and lifestyle data into AI insights and clinical protocols via medical and benefits partners.
highlight.zh: Play Health 服務美國 3,000 多萬名每年花費逾 150 億美元處理症狀的女性,透過醫療與福利合作夥伴,將症狀、用藥與生活方式資料整合為 AI 洞察與臨床方案。

summary.en: Patent Watch uses AI to detect patent infringements.
summary.zh: Patent Watch 運用 AI 偵測專利侵權。

highlight.en: Patent Watch interprets patents, identifies competing products, and generates claim charts showing who infringes and how, plus invalidity searches, helping firms turn dormant portfolios into revenue.
highlight.zh: Patent Watch 解讀專利、找出競爭產品並生成主張對照表,標明誰侵權及如何侵權,還能進行無效搜尋,協助公司將閒置的專利組合轉化為營收。

summary.en: Anto Biosciences is building a foundation model for microbial communities.
summary.zh: Anto Biosciences 正打造微生物群落的基礎模型。

highlight.en: By making the gut microbiome computable, Anto predicts drug toxicity and efficacy across diverse populations and fixes drugs so they work for everyone, tackling a hidden root cause of drug failures.
highlight.zh: 透過讓腸道微生物組可運算,Anto 預測藥物在不同族群的毒性與療效,並修正藥物使其對所有人有效,直擊多數藥物失敗的隱藏根因。

summary.en: Automax.ai is an AI-native real-estate appraisal firm.
summary.zh: Automax.ai 是 AI 原生的不動產估價公司。

highlight.en: Automax.ai's mobile app uses LiDAR and computer vision to capture property details, and AI agents generate a Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac compliant appraisal report in under 20 minutes.
highlight.zh: Automax.ai 的行動應用以 LiDAR 與電腦視覺擷取房產細節,AI 代理在 20 分鐘內產出符合 Fannie Mae 與 Freddie Mac 規範的完整估價報告。

summary.en: Metorial is agentic infrastructure that powers AI-native companies.
summary.zh: Metorial 是支撐 AI 原生公司的代理式基礎設施。

highlight.en: Metorial gives every employee, agent, and AI client one place to connect tools and skills, with governance, access control, and tracing built in.
highlight.zh: Metorial 讓每位員工、代理與 AI 客戶端在單一處連接工具與技能,並內建治理、存取控管與追蹤功能。

summary.en: Perseus is an applied lab focused on search in latent spaces.
summary.zh: Perseus 是專注於潛在空間搜尋的應用實驗室。

highlight.en: Using an iterative branching search of high-dimensional spaces, Perseus's first product helps coding agents find the right codebase context across files, symbols, and dependencies in parallel before writing.
highlight.zh: Perseus 以高維空間的迭代分支搜尋為基礎,其首款產品協助編碼代理在動筆前,平行搜尋檔案、符號與相依關係,找到正確的程式庫上下文。

summary.en: Jarmin builds AI employees for human-level roles.
summary.zh: Jarmin 為人類等級的職務打造 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Jarmin's AI employees learn their responsibilities and embed into your systems to fill roles like ML engineer, account executive, paralegal, and financial analyst; its team hails from Meta, Apple, and AWS.
highlight.zh: Jarmin 的 AI 員工學習職責並嵌入你的系統,擔任 ML 工程師、客戶經理、法務助理與財務分析師等職務;其團隊來自 Meta、Apple 與 AWS。

summary.en: MadeThis is an autonomous business platform.
summary.zh: MadeThis 是自主化的商業營運平台。

highlight.en: MadeThis positions itself as a platform for running businesses autonomously, automating operations without constant human direction.
highlight.zh: MadeThis 將自己定位為自主經營事業的平台,讓營運無需人類持續指揮即可自動化運作。

summary.en: Velvet is a multimodal data lab.
summary.zh: Velvet 是多模態資料實驗室。

highlight.en: Velvet operates as a multimodal data lab, focusing on data that spans multiple modalities such as text, images, and audio.
highlight.zh: Velvet 以多模態資料實驗室運作,專注於橫跨文字、影像與音訊等多種模態的資料。

summary.en: LunaBill builds AI voice callers for healthcare billing teams.
summary.zh: LunaBill 為醫療帳務團隊打造 AI 語音通話員。

highlight.en: Insurance follow-up calls are 80% of billing teams' workload; since July, LunaBill reached $764K contracted ARR, automated 50,000+ calls, and converted 100% of pilots, partnering with UC, Mayo, and Experian Health.
highlight.zh: 保險跟催電話佔帳務團隊 80% 的工作量;自七月以來,LunaBill 已達 76.4 萬美元簽約年度經常性收入、自動化逾 5 萬通電話、試行轉換率 100%,並與 UC、Mayo 與 Experian Health 合作。

summary.en: Zarna is private equity's first AI associate class.
summary.zh: Zarna 是私募股權業界的首個 AI 投資助理梯隊。

highlight.en: Zarna's agents plug into a firm's data to analyze CIMs, build LBOs, update CRMs, and draft IC memos, freeing investors to focus on judgment, relationships, and winning deals.
highlight.zh: Zarna 的代理接入公司資料,分析機密資訊備忘錄、建構槓桿收購模型、更新 CRM 並撰寫投資委員會備忘錄,讓投資人專注於判斷、人脈與贏得交易。

summary.en: Openroll is an AI workforce for people and finance teams.
summary.zh: Openroll 是為人資與財務團隊打造的 AI 勞動力。

highlight.en: Openroll lets people and finance teams automate recurring work and run fully auditable workflows, bringing compensation, headcount, and budgeting into one platform.
highlight.zh: Openroll 讓人資與財務團隊自動化重複性工作並執行可完整稽核的流程,將薪酬、人力編制與預算整合進單一平台。

summary.en: OpenBuilder is a vibe coding platform that helps non-technical builders ship to production.
summary.zh: OpenBuilder 是憑感覺寫程式的平台,協助非技術建構者把作品推上線。

highlight.en: Unlike credit-limited rivals, OpenBuilder offers unlimited build credits, gets non-technical builders unstuck and production-ready, and gives them access to all their code from day one.
highlight.zh: 有別於受點數限制的競品,OpenBuilder 提供無限建構點數,協助非技術建構者突破卡關並準備上線,並讓他們從第一天起就能取得自己的全部程式碼。

summary.en: Goldbridge is building a financial operating system for real estate, like Ramp for real estate.
summary.zh: Goldbridge 為不動產打造金融作業系統,被喻為不動產版的 Ramp。

highlight.en: With over $1T in rent flowing through landlord accounts annually and $2.5T in loans maturing in 2027/28, Goldbridge builds the first AI-powered banking platform for real estate owners.
highlight.zh: 每年逾一兆美元租金流經房東帳戶,且 2027/28 年將有 2.5 兆美元貸款到期,Goldbridge 為不動產業主打造首個 AI 驅動的銀行平台。

summary.en: Fifth Door lets anyone create and play games with AI.
summary.zh: Fifth Door 讓任何人都能用 AI 創作並遊玩遊戲。

highlight.en: Fifth Door makes it easy for everyone to create, share, and play games anywhere with anyone, aiming to spark the creativity, connection, and joy of play.
highlight.zh: Fifth Door 讓每個人都能隨時隨地與任何人創作、分享並遊玩遊戲,致力激發遊玩帶來的創意、連結與喜悅。

summary.en: Nori is a concierge-level AI health coach in your pocket.
summary.zh: Nori 是隨身的管家級 AI 健康教練。

highlight.en: Nori takes all your health data, from Apple Health to medical records and wearables, and distills it into a personalized daily plan; users report improved deep sleep and recovery.
highlight.zh: Nori 整合你所有的健康資料,從 Apple Health 到病歷與穿戴裝置,濃縮成個人化的每日計畫;使用者回報深層睡眠與恢復狀況改善。

summary.en: Digipals is an AI-native social operating system to improve relationships with friends.
summary.zh: Digipals 是 AI 原生的社交作業系統,旨在改善與朋友的關係。

highlight.en: Digipals builds ambient AI agents that use location, calendar, and photo context to take action and write code in group chats, reuniting social lives fragmented across iMessage, WhatsApp, and more.
highlight.zh: Digipals 打造環境感知的 AI 代理,運用位置、行事曆與照片的脈絡,在群組聊天中採取行動並寫程式,重新整合散落於 iMessage、WhatsApp 等多個應用的社交生活。

summary.en: Semiotic builds AI design agents, starting with landing pages for fast-growing startups.
summary.zh: Semiotic 打造 AI 設計代理,從為快速成長新創設計到達頁起步。

highlight.en: Semiotic offers studio-grade design at scale, breaking the choice between gradient-slop AI builders and agencies with three-month waitlists and $100k minimums.
highlight.zh: Semiotic 提供大規模的工作室級設計,打破在漸層俗氣的 AI 建站工具與排隊三個月、起價十萬美元的設計公司之間二選一的困境。
